name: nav-rail
title: Tool Rail
description: Fixed icon-over-label edge rail for switching tools or modes.

api.description: Tool rail: fixed icon-over-label edge chrome for switching tools or modes. Compose items and separators in any order. Place on left, right, top, or bottom. Use edgeShadow with shadowIntensity (2xs to 4xl, subtle, default, strong, or 0 to 1) for a side-matched cast. Chrome is tokenized via --df-nav-rail-* and kit --df-shadow-intensity-* steps.

groups.title: NavRail
groups.description: Edge strip for a flex workspace shell. Vertical sides stack items; horizontal sides row them. Pass appearance props or set the matching CSS variables on style.

props.name: side
props.description: Which edge the rail sits on. Controls axis, item flow, separator orientation, and which side draws the inner border.

props.name: width
props.description: Cross-axis size of the rail. Prefer tokens such as var(--df-nav-rail-width) or calc(18 * var(--spacing-unit)). On left or right this is the rail width. On top or bottom this is the rail height. Sets --df-nav-rail-width.

props.name: radius
props.description: Corner radius of the rail shell. Maps to --df-nav-rail-radius.

props.name: itemRadius
props.description: Corner radius of item icon plates. Maps to --df-nav-rail-item-radius.

props.name: cornerShape
props.description: Instance corner curve. Omit to inherit --df-corner-shape from the theme (set at create/init).

props.name: background
props.description: Rail background. Prefer tokens such as var(--background) or var(--card). Sets --df-nav-rail-bg.

props.name: borderColor
props.description: Inner-edge border color. Prefer tokens such as var(--border). Sets --df-nav-rail-border.

props.name: iconColor
props.description: Resting icon and label color for all items. Prefer tokens such as var(--muted-foreground). Sets --df-nav-rail-fg.

props.name: activeBackground
props.description: Active icon-plate fill. Prefer tokens such as var(--df-nav-rail-item-active-bg). Sets --df-nav-rail-item-active-bg on this instance.

props.name: activeForeground
props.description: Active icon and label color. Prefer tokens such as var(--df-nav-rail-item-active-fg). Sets --df-nav-rail-item-active-fg on this instance.

props.name: shadow
props.description: Box shadow. Prefer var(--df-nav-rail-shadow-edge-left), right, top, or bottom for an edge cast toward the workspace, or none. Overrides edgeShadow when set. Sets --df-nav-rail-shadow.

props.name: edgeShadow
props.description: When true and shadow is omitted, applies the side-matched edge shadow token.

props.name: shadowIntensity
props.description: Edge shadow strength from the kit cast scale (--df-shadow-intensity-*). Prefer 2xs to 4xl. subtle, default, and strong alias xs, lg, and 2xl. Pass 0 to 1 only for a custom strength. Sets --df-nav-rail-shadow-intensity. Theme default is --df-shadow-intensity-default.

props.name: children
props.description: Compose NavRailItem and NavRailSeparator in any order. Omit an item to remove it; place separators where you want groups.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes on the rail root.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles. Override --df-nav-rail-width, --df-nav-rail-bg, --df-nav-rail-border, --df-nav-rail-fg, --df-nav-rail-item-active-bg, --df-nav-rail-item-active-fg, --df-nav-rail-shadow, --df-nav-rail-shadow-intensity, --df-nav-rail-radius, or --df-nav-rail-item-radius directly.

props.name: …nav attributes
props.description: Native nav attributes on the rail root.

groups.title: NavRailItem
groups.description: Centered icon with a short label underneath. Pass any icon node. Set active for the current item. Use disabled or hidden for availability. Buttons expose aria-pressed; link hosts via asChild expose aria-current when active.

props.name: icon
props.description: Glyph shown above the label. Replace per item as needed.

props.name: active
props.description: Marks the current item and styles the icon plate.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables interaction and dims the item. Works for button and asChild link hosts.

props.name: hidden
props.description: When true, the item is not rendered.

props.name: iconColor
props.description: Resting icon and label color for this item. Prefer tokens. Sets --df-nav-rail-item-fg.

props.name: activeBackground
props.description: Active icon-plate fill for this item. Prefer tokens. Sets --df-nav-rail-item-active-bg.

props.name: activeForeground
props.description: Active icon and label color for this item. Prefer tokens. Sets --df-nav-rail-item-active-fg.

props.name: asChild
props.description: Merge item props onto a single child element. The child becomes the interactive root; icon and label render inside it.

props.name: children
props.description: Short label when asChild is false. When asChild is true, a single element whose children are the label text.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes on the item root.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles. Override --df-nav-rail-item-fg, --df-nav-rail-item-active-bg, or --df-nav-rail-item-active-fg directly.

props.name: …button attributes
props.description: Native button attributes when asChild is false. With asChild, compatible props merge onto the child.

groups.title: NavRailSeparator
groups.description: Hairline divider between item groups. Place anywhere in the rail children.

props.name: color
props.description: Separator color. Prefer tokens such as var(--border). Sets --df-nav-rail-separator.

props.name: hidden
props.description: When true, the separator is not rendered.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes on the separator.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles. Override --df-nav-rail-separator directly.

props.name: …div attributes
props.description: Native div attributes on the separator.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --df-nav-rail-width
props.description: Cross-axis size. Width on left or right; height on top or bottom.

props.name: --df-nav-rail-bg
props.description: Rail background.

props.name: --df-nav-rail-border
props.description: Inner-edge border color.

props.name: --df-nav-rail-fg
props.description: Resting icon and label color.

props.name: --df-nav-rail-fg-hover
props.description: Hover icon and label color.

props.name: --df-nav-rail-item-hover-bg
props.description: Hover icon-plate fill.

props.name: --df-nav-rail-item-active-bg
props.description: Active icon-plate fill.

props.name: --df-nav-rail-item-active-fg
props.description: Active icon and label color.

props.name: --df-nav-rail-separator
props.description: Separator fill.

props.name: --df-shadow-intensity-2xs
props.description: Kit cast strength scale: 2xs.

props.name: --df-shadow-intensity-xs
props.description: Kit cast strength scale: xs.

props.name: --df-shadow-intensity-sm
props.description: Kit cast strength scale: sm.

props.name: --df-shadow-intensity-md
props.description: Kit cast strength scale: md.

props.name: --df-shadow-intensity-lg
props.description: Kit cast strength scale: lg.

props.name: --df-shadow-intensity-xl
props.description: Kit cast strength scale: xl.

props.name: --df-shadow-intensity-2xl
props.description: Kit cast strength scale: 2xl.

props.name: --df-shadow-intensity-3xl
props.description: Kit cast strength scale: 3xl.

props.name: --df-shadow-intensity-4xl
props.description: Kit cast strength scale: 4xl.

props.name: --df-shadow-intensity-subtle
props.description: Alias of --df-shadow-intensity-xs.

props.name: --df-shadow-intensity-default
props.description: Alias of --df-shadow-intensity-lg.

props.name: --df-shadow-intensity-strong
props.description: Alias of --df-shadow-intensity-2xl.

props.name: --df-nav-rail-shadow
props.description: Rail box shadow.

props.name: --df-nav-rail-shadow-intensity
props.description: Opacity used by edge shadow tokens. Defaults to --df-shadow-intensity-default. Set via shadowIntensity.

props.name: --df-nav-rail-shadow-edge-left
props.description: Edge shadow for side left. Strength follows --df-nav-rail-shadow-intensity.

props.name: --df-nav-rail-shadow-edge-right
props.description: Edge shadow for side right. Strength follows --df-nav-rail-shadow-intensity.

props.name: --df-nav-rail-shadow-edge-top
props.description: Edge shadow for side top. Strength follows --df-nav-rail-shadow-intensity.

props.name: --df-nav-rail-shadow-edge-bottom
props.description: Edge shadow for side bottom. Strength follows --df-nav-rail-shadow-intensity.

props.name: --df-nav-rail-radius
props.description: Rail shell corner radius.

props.name: --df-nav-rail-item-radius
props.description: Item icon-plate corner radius.

props.name: --df-corner-shape
props.description: Theme corner curve for all kit chrome. round = circular arcs; smooth = continuous squircle. Set with df-ui init --corner-shape, or override on :root. Default round.

props.name: --df-demo-stage-height
props.description: Shared height for docs workspace stage frames.
